ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the asset */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Unique resource identifier for the asset */,
  "url" TEXT /* Web URL for the asset */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the asset */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the asset is copyrighted and by whom */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* The type of license associated with the asset (e.g., Creative Commons, proprietary) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the asset was originally created */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The date the asset will expire or become invalid */,
  "source" TEXT /* The original source of the asset (e.g., uploaded by a user, purchased from a stock media site) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, editor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to (e.g., Marketing, Content Creation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the label is attached to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the label */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_labels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_labels_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the update */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the update, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_updates_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_updates_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_clauses" (
  "clause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search clause */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the search clause is associated with */,
  "search_clause" TEXT /* The search clause used to optimize searchability */,
  "clause_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the search clause */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the search clause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_clauses_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_clauses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the metadata is associated with */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the asset (e.g., JPEG, MP4) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the asset in MB */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the asset (e.g., 1920x1080 for videos) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the asset in seconds (for videos) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the asset is stored */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* A checksum to verify the integrity of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the asset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the asset has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the asset has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the asset has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the asset */,
  "downloads_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the asset */,
  "last_engagement_date" TEXT /* The date of the last engagement (view, like, share, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_engagement_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was left */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is approved for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the revision is for */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the asset in the revision */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the revision is approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_revisions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., engagement, performance, analytics) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_reports_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the permission is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_permissions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tags_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
